title: Improve 3D graphics quality and visual polish

requirements.text: Enhance 3D building models with improved geometry, textures, and materials using Three.js capabilities - add depth, detail, and visual hierarchy to all building types (Town Hall, Gold Mine, Elixir Collector, Gold Storage, Elixir Storage, Barracks, Cannon, Archer Tower, Walls)
acceptanceCriteria: Buildings have more detailed 3D geometry beyond basic boxes and cylinders
Materials include appropriate lighting response (metallic, roughness properties)
Buildings have visual depth with multiple components and layers
Each building type has a distinct visual identity

requirements.text: Add shadows and improved lighting to the 3D scene including ambient occlusion, directional shadows from buildings, and enhanced ambient lighting for better depth perception
acceptanceCriteria: Buildings cast realistic shadows on the terrain
Scene has proper ambient and directional lighting
Shadows are optimized for performance
Overall scene has improved depth and atmosphere

requirements.text: Improve terrain rendering with textured ground plane instead of plain grid, add subtle terrain variations, and enhance the grid visualization to be less intrusive
acceptanceCriteria: Ground has grass or stone texture instead of solid color
Grid lines are subtle and blend with the theme
Terrain feels more organic and less flat
Grid remains functional for building placement

requirements.text: Add visual effects and polish including smooth building construction animations, resource collection particle effects, attack impact effects, and building destruction animations
acceptanceCriteria: Buildings have construction progress animation (fade in, grow, or build up effect)
Resource buildings show particle effects when generating resources
Attack mode shows visual feedback for troop attacks and building damage
Transitions and interactions feel polished and responsive

requirements.text: Enhance troop 3D models in attack mode with more detailed character representations, animations, and visual variety beyond basic capsule shapes
acceptanceCriteria: Troops have distinctive 3D models that match their type (Barbarian, Archer, Giant)
Troops have simple walk/attack animations or movement effects
Each troop type is visually distinguishable at a glance
HP bars remain functional and visible

constraints: Maintain compatibility with React Three Fiber and Three.js
Ensure performance remains acceptable with multiple buildings and troops visible
Do not modify backend logic or game mechanics
Keep existing building placement and grid snap functionality intact
Do not change hooks in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, or useInternetIdentity.tsx

required: Grass terrain texture with medieval fantasy style, seamless tileable pattern (grass-terrain.dim_512x512.png)
Stone path texture for building areas, medieval cobblestone style (stone-path.dim_512x512.png)
